summary: Comprehensive testing of GMC Platform completed. Backend APIs mostly functional with some permission issues. Frontend fully operational with excellent user experience.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Health endpoint returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or be at different path

permission_issues.issue: Returns 403 Insufficient permissions despite admin login via API
permission_issues.impact: Admin statistics not accessible via API

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@gmc.com / Admin@123)
Dashboard loads with stats cards and quick actions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix API permission issues for admin endpoints. The admin user can access all features via frontend but API calls return 403 errors. This suggests a cookie vs token authentication issue in the backend.
